metadata.note:
Synthetic, PII-free BODY-DEPENDENT eval set. Every item is built so that from+subject+snippet point at the WRONG tier and the true tier lives only in the body. Purpose: measure the JUDGE_INCLUDE_BODY flag (poc-judge.ts). Run it twice and compare 'Overall accuracy' + per-tier recall:
  JUDGE_INCLUDE_BODY=false DATABASE_URL=... OPENROUTER_API_KEY=... npx tsx scripts/poc-accuracy.ts --in=eval/judge-body-eval-set.json --concurrency=1 --delay=3000
  JUDGE_INCLUDE_BODY=true  DATABASE_URL=... OPENROUTER_API_KEY=... npx tsx scripts/poc-accuracy.ts --in=eval/judge-body-eval-set.json --concurrency=1 --delay=3000
body=off accuracy is the floor (judge is blind to the body); body=on accuracy is the measured value of feeding the body. The delta = what the body buys. This is NOT the locked 50-item gate — the tier-floor FAIL/exit-2 on the body=off run is expected (that is the point).

items.subject: Re: following up
items.snippet: Hi, hope the week is going well. Circling back on a couple of items from our last call.
items.body: Hi — hope the week is going well. Circling back on a couple of items from our last call. The main thing: legal flagged that Acme will walk from the signed agreement unless we return the countersigned addendum before 5pm today. I need your approval in the next hour or we lose the deal. Everything else can wait.
items.label: PUSH
items.note: Subject/snippet read as a routine QUEUE follow-up; the deal-killing same-day deadline is body-only.

items.subject: quick note when you get a sec
items.snippet: Wanted to flag something, no big deal, whenever you are free.
items.body: Wanted to flag something. Production login has been down for about 40 minutes — customers cannot sign in and support tickets are piling up. I have a rollback ready but I need your sign-off to ship it now. Can you reply in the next few minutes?
items.label: PUSH
items.note: Snippet is deliberately casual ('no big deal'); the outage + sign-off request that make it PUSH are body-only.

items.subject: An update about your account
items.snippet: We have some news to share with you.
items.body: Big news — we are launching our Pro plan! Upgrade now and save 40% this week only. A limited-time offer for our loyal users. Click here to claim your discount before it expires. Unsubscribe anytime.
items.label: SILENT
items.note: Subject looks like a transactional account notice (QUEUE); the body is pure promotional marketing. No PROMOTIONS label, so the marketing fast-path does not fire — only body-on reveals it.

items.subject: URGENT: action required
items.snippet: Immediate attention needed on the items below.
items.body: Thanks for your patience. Just so it is on your radar — whenever you get to it over the next couple of weeks, could you review the updated style guide? No rush at all, the end of the month is totally fine.
items.label: QUEUE
items.note: Subject screams urgency; the body explicitly says no rush / end of month. body-on should pull it down from a false PUSH.

items.subject: Re: Re: Re: project sync notes
items.snippet: Thanks everyone for the detailed notes from today's sync.
items.body: Thanks everyone for the detailed notes from today's sync. Lots of good threads in here. One thing that cannot slip: the board deck has to be finalized and sent to the investors by tomorrow 9am or we miss the quarterly review window entirely. The owner for that is you — please confirm tonight.
items.label: PUSH
items.note: Reads as a recap thread (QUEUE); the hard tomorrow-9am board deadline + ownership are at the end of the body.

items.subject: Re: your request
items.body: This is an automated confirmation that your monthly invoice has been paid in full. No action is needed. A copy is attached for your records. Please do not reply to this message.
items.label: AUTO
items.note: Subject implies an open conversation needing a reply; the body shows an automated paid-invoice receipt — reversible + no action, so the AUTO signal is body-only.

items.subject: checking in
items.body: Hope you are doing well. Heads up — our exec team is reconsidering the renewal and wants a call before they decide. If we do not talk today, they will likely sign with the other vendor instead. Are you free this afternoon?
items.label: PUSH
items.note: Bland 'checking in' subject; the at-risk renewal + same-day call that make it PUSH are body-only.

items.subject: newsletter + one ask
items.snippet: Our monthly newsletter is here with product updates and tips.
items.body: Our monthly newsletter is here with the usual product updates and tips. P.S. — separately, could you send over the Q3 numbers when you have a chance this week? Our finance team needs them to close the joint report.
items.label: QUEUE
items.note: Snippet reads as a newsletter (SILENT); a genuine same-week work ask is appended in the body, making it QUEUE.
